scenario: Topic rate stability under additional DDS traffic load
load_source: 1000 Hz String messages on /helix_test_load (~14000 messages published)
expected_effect: Robot topic rates should remain stable despite additional DDS traffic from monitoring
observed_effect: Rate changed from 18.81 Hz to 18.80 Hz (0.05% decrease) — within measurement noise. DDS load from HELIX monitoring has no measurable impact on GO2 topic delivery.
supports_claim: HELIX monitoring adds negligible overhead to DDS transport; safe for continuous deployment alongside GO2
notes: Load was published to a non-GO2 topic (/helix_test_load). Fully reversible.
